column1: # The guard routes usage-verdict's exit code: PAUSE(1) -> block, everything
# else -> advise. Tab-separated; # and blank lines ignored. Offsets are seconds
# from *now* (static snapshots would age into permanent STALE). pct=UNREADABLE
# writes no snapshot. cred_age '-' writes no credentials file.
# Defaults under test: PAUSE_PCT=80, STALE_AGE=600, LOGIN_WINDOW=600.
# advise — OK: under threshold, the fresh verdict rides as additionalContext

column6: OK under threshold -> advise (verdict rides in context)

column1: # block — PAUSE: over threshold, fresh, live window (the one sanctioned deny)

column6: PAUSE over threshold with a fresh login -> still block: the login reroute may suppress an OK, never a PAUSE

column1: # advise — budget unknown is decision-relevant but must never wedge delegation

column6: missing snapshot (no producer) -> advise, not wedged

column1: # advise — RESET-OK: dead-window pct must not read as a pause
